references.question: When do the new StreamPlus prices take effect?
references.reference: The new StreamPlus prices take effect on 1 September 2026. This information is stated in the provided StreamPlus notice and should be interpreted within the price-change and billing timeline section.

references.question: As of which date was the StreamPlus price increase announced?
references.reference: The price increase is stated as of 15 July 2026. This information is stated in the provided StreamPlus notice and should be interpreted within the price-change and billing timeline section.

references.question: Through whose invoices are StreamPlus options billed in this notice?
references.reference: They are billed through GlobalConnect invoices. This information is stated in the provided StreamPlus notice and should be interpreted within the price-change and billing timeline section.

references.question: Which option categories are affected by the StreamPlus price change?
references.reference: The change applies to additional options on fixed and mobile services and to upgrade options. This information is stated in the provided StreamPlus notice and should be interpreted within the price-change and billing timeline section.

references.question: Will existing users be informed about the price change?
references.reference: Yes. Existing users will be notified of the change. This is explicitly stated in the provided StreamPlus notice, specifically in the price-change and billing timeline section.

references.question: When will the first invoices with the new StreamPlus prices be issued?
references.reference: The first invoices with the new prices will be issued in October 2026. This information is stated in the provided StreamPlus notice and should be interpreted within the price-change and billing timeline section.

references.question: What usage period do the first updated invoices reflect?
references.reference: They reflect September 2026 usage. This information is stated in the provided StreamPlus notice and should be interpreted within the price-change and billing timeline section.

references.question: Do the listed StreamPlus prices include VAT?
references.reference: Yes. All listed prices include VAT. This is explicitly stated in the provided StreamPlus notice, specifically in the price-change and billing timeline section.

references.question: Does annual inflation indexation apply to StreamPlus packages?
references.reference: No. Annual inflation indexation does not apply to StreamPlus packages. This is explicitly stated in the provided StreamPlus notice, specifically in the price-change and billing timeline section.

references.question: What is the start date of the activation notification window?
references.reference: The activation notification window starts on 1 August 2026. This information is stated in the provided StreamPlus notice and should be interpreted within the price-change and billing timeline section.

references.question: What is the end date of the activation notification window?
references.reference: The activation notification window ends on 1 September 2026. This information is stated in the provided StreamPlus notice and should be interpreted within the price-change and billing timeline section.

references.question: Which users receive a notice confirming consent to the new price?
references.reference: Users who activate options affected by the price change between 1 August 2026 and 1 September 2026 receive the notice. This information is stated in the provided StreamPlus notice and should be interpreted within the price-change and billing timeline section.

references.question: What does the activation notice confirm?
references.reference: It confirms user consent to the price increase effective 1 September 2026. This information is stated in the provided StreamPlus notice and should be interpreted within the price-change and billing timeline section.

references.question: Is StreamPlus account recovery available to both fixed and mobile users?
references.reference: Yes. Account recovery is available for all fixed and mobile service users. This is explicitly stated in the provided StreamPlus notice, specifically in the account recovery and incident section.

references.question: Which self-service portal is listed for StreamPlus account recovery?
references.reference: The MyGlobal portal is listed. This information is stated in the provided StreamPlus notice and should be interpreted within the account recovery and incident section.

references.question: Since when is StreamPlus recovery available on the MyGlobal portal?
references.reference: It is available since 10 March 2026. This information is stated in the provided StreamPlus notice and should be interpreted within the account recovery and incident section.

references.question: Which mobile app supports StreamPlus recovery?
references.reference: The GlobalConnect mobile application supports StreamPlus recovery. This information is stated in the provided StreamPlus notice and should be interpreted within the account recovery and incident section.

references.question: Since when is StreamPlus recovery available in the GlobalConnect mobile app?
references.reference: It is available since 12 March 2026. This information is stated in the provided StreamPlus notice and should be interpreted within the account recovery and incident section.

references.question: How is the recovery link delivered to mobile service users?
references.reference: Mobile users receive the link via SMS to the number associated with the StreamPlus service. This information is stated in the provided StreamPlus notice and should be interpreted within the account recovery and incident section.

references.question: How is the recovery link delivered to fixed service users?
references.reference: Fixed users receive the link via email to the address linked to their GlobalConnect ID. This information is stated in the provided StreamPlus notice and should be interpreted within the account recovery and incident section.

references.question: Where does the recovery link redirect the user?
references.reference: It redirects the user to the StreamPlus recovery or registration page. This information is stated in the provided StreamPlus notice and should be interpreted within the account recovery and incident section.

references.question: Can fixed users complete the process through digital service assistance?
references.reference: Yes. Fixed users can also complete the process through digital service assistance (DSA). This is explicitly stated in the provided StreamPlus notice, specifically in the relevant section of the StreamPlus notice.

references.question: What error do some active StreamPlus subscribers see?
references.reference: The reported error is: "The activation link is no longer valid." This information is stated in the provided StreamPlus notice and should be interpreted within the relevant section of the StreamPlus notice.

references.question: Under what condition does the activation-link error occur?
references.reference: It occurs after re-suspension when users attempt to re-register. This information is stated in the provided StreamPlus notice and should be interpreted within the price-change and billing timeline section.

references.question: What is the current status of the re-suspension issue?
references.reference: The issue is currently under investigation. This information is stated in the provided StreamPlus notice and should be interpreted within the account recovery and incident section.

references.question: Can affected users re-register through GlobalConnect before the issue is resolved?
references.reference: No. Affected users cannot re-register their StreamPlus account through GlobalConnect until the issue is resolved. This is explicitly stated in the provided StreamPlus notice, specifically in the account recovery and incident section.

references.question: What action is promised after the re-registration issue is fixed?
references.reference: New registration links will be sent once the issue is fixed. This information is stated in the provided StreamPlus notice and should be interpreted within the account recovery and incident section.

references.question: Since when has StreamPlus been included in the GlobalConnect offer?
references.reference: StreamPlus has been included in the GlobalConnect offer since 5 May 2026. This information is stated in the provided StreamPlus notice and should be interpreted within the relevant section of the StreamPlus notice.

references.question: How is StreamPlus described in the document?
references.reference: StreamPlus is described as a streaming platform for movies, series, live events, documentaries, and exclusive content. This information is stated in the provided StreamPlus notice and should be interpreted within the relevant section of the StreamPlus notice.

references.question: Does the StreamPlus description mention advertisements?
references.reference: It states the content can be watched without advertisements. This information is stated in the provided StreamPlus notice and should be interpreted within the relevant section of the StreamPlus notice.

references.question: On which ConnectTV device path can users access StreamPlus?
references.reference: Via ConnectTV Android receiver in Main Menu -> "Home" -> "Apps". This information is stated in the provided StreamPlus notice and should be interpreted within the availability and supported-device section.
